pageTitle: Lit Technologies Case Study — Rahul Antony
heroTitle: Lit Technologies → Udaan: Building a B2B Commerce Platform from Scratch
heroDesc: From concept to acquisition — owning product design, category strategy, and operational readiness for a kirana-focused M-commerce marketplace in Trivandrum, Kerala.

context.para1: Lit Technologies was an M-commerce marketplace established in December 2017, serving kirana stores and HoReCa clients in Trivandrum, Kerala. The model was simple but operationally complex — store owners placed orders through the app before 7pm, and goods were delivered the next working day.
context.para2: As Head of Design, I led the overall development of the brand, platform, customer support, and post-sales experience. The role was roughly split: 40% product design (UI/UX), 40% sales and brand management, and 20% customer relations — essentially building every customer-facing touchpoint from the ground up.

consumerApp.title: B2B Consumer Ordering App
consumerApp.para1: Designed and iterated the B2B ordering app for kirana stores. The user base was predominantly local language speakers (70%+), which shaped every design decision — from simplified navigation to vernacular-first communication.
consumerApp.para2: The app grew from 89 installs at launch (April 2018) to 5,000+ installs with 1,900+ monthly active orderers by December 2020, through continuous iteration based on user interviews and in-field testing.

deliveryApp.title: Internal Delivery & Routing App
deliveryApp.description: Designed the internal operations suite — a delivery management app used by drivers to execute daily routes, manage store-level deliveries, capture cash reconciliation, and handle returns. The system tracked over 12 million kgs of goods delivered in under 28 months.

video.title: Platform in Action
video.caption: Lit Technologies — A kirana store owner placing an order through the platform

dashboard.title: Sales Analytics Dashboard
dashboard.description: Built from actual operational data covering March 2018 to May 2020 — the Lit Technologies period. The dashboard shows revenue trends, category performance, customer segmentation, return analysis, and margin structure across 319K+ line items.
dashboard.note: This dashboard reflects Lit Technologies operational data (Mar 2018 – May 2020). The total GMV of ₹55Cr+ includes the post-acquisition Udaan period through October 2020.

thirdPartyProjects.title: HHYS Inframart — CRM & E-commerce
thirdPartyProjects.description: B2C e-commerce app and employee CRM for Kerala's leading building materials provider. 4,000+ SKUs across hardware, sanitary, and electricals.

thirdPartyProjects.title: Jeevani Sanjeevani — Kerala Govt × Suntec
thirdPartyProjects.description: Farm-to-consumer platform digitising Horticorp stalls for the Kerala Agriculture Department. Designed B2C food delivery app and rider/delivery partner app.

acquisition.title: Acquisition & Migration to Udaan
acquisition.para1: In October 2020, Lit Technologies was acquired by Udaan — India's largest B2B trade platform. Post-acquisition, led the platform migration achieving 100% user retention, launched Udaan in Kochi within three months, and onboarded major FMCG brands including HUL, Coke, Nestle, P&G, PepsiCo, and Reckitt.
acquisition.para2: The acquisition validated the platform's approach — the simplified app workflow designed for local language speakers at Lit Technologies directly informed adaptations made to the Udaan platform for the Kerala market.
